prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-BGPMSKWTAGPA2V-BUN-4PC-BNDL Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Beginner Gold Panning Kit with Trowel, Gold Pan, 2 Collection Tools Description: This gold panning starter kit is a great way to get started making your fortune in precious metals.

With the price of gold skyrocketing, now is the perfect time to start prospecting. This set includes a trowel for digging; a pan to separate the gold from the dirt; and two different-sized fine gold recovery tools.

Not only is this set good for gold panning, some of these items have a variety of applications. The trowel is a good multipurpose digging tool and has a 4" measuring scale on the scoop. The collection tools can be used to store any small items. Don't miss out on this gold panning starter kit while the price of gold is still high! Search Terms: beginner mining prospecting kit gold panning digger hiking backpacking mine equipment tools river stream sluice Features: - Gold Pan: 10" Diameter - Trowel: 11 inch x 3.2 inch (L x W) - Large Collection Tool: 6.4 cm x 1.75 cm (H x dia) - Small Collection Tool: 3.8 cm x 1.5 cm (H x dia) - Great for Beginners === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Beginner Gold Panning Kit with Trowel

anthropic.title_differentiation: 10 Inch Gold Pan, Trowel With Measuring Scale, 2 Collection Tools, Beginner Prospecting Kit

openai.title_differentiation: 10" Gold Pan, 11" Trowel With 4" Measuring Scale, 2 Fine Recovery Tools, Great For Beginners, Multipurpose Use
